name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Freezing rain and areas of fog before 1am, then rain likely and areas of fog between 1am and 3am, then areas of fog and a chance of rain between 3am and 5am. Cloudy, with a low around 30. Northwest wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
